tool_input.claimed_quote: Trp53 fl/fl ;Wwox fl/fl (18, 41) mice were bred with K14-Cre mice (JAX) to generate double conditional KO (DKO) mice: K14-Cre; Wwox fl/fl Trp53 fl/fl and the other genotypes.
Trp53 fl/fl ;Wwox fl/fl (18, 41) mice were bred with K14-Cre mice (JAX) to generate double conditional KO (DKO) mice: K14-Cre; Wwox fl/fl Trp53 fl/fl and the other genotypes.
